ext_description.message: Transform Chrome's new tab into macOS's gorgeous aerial screensaver videos.

options_video_reverse_proxy_note.message: If sylvan.apple.com isn't trusted by your system, the reverse proxy fetches videos for you.

options_video_local_note.message: Run an Apache server on localhost serving Apple aerial .mov / .mp4 files. See the README for setup.

options_video_show_refresh.message: Show refresh button on new tab

error_video_apple.message: Couldn't load videos from Apple's server. Try enabling the reverse proxy in settings, or trust sylvan.apple.com's certificate manually.

error_video_local.message: Couldn't reach the local video server. Check the URL in settings.

error_video_local_empty.message: Local server reachable but no .mov / .mp4 files found.

options_weather_city_hint.message: Type a city name (English works best) and press Enter or click Save. We verify against the weather service before saving.

options_weather_city_invalid.message: Couldn't find that city. Try a more standard name.

error_get_weather.message: Couldn't fetch weather. Check the city name in settings.

options_show_topsites.message: Show top sites on new tab

topsites_empty.message: No top sites yet — visit some pages first.

options_show_zen.message: Show Zen mode button on new tab

options_display_hint.message: Choose what appears on the new tab page.

video_apple_help_title.message: Why might Apple's server need extra setup?

video_apple_help_intro.message: Chrome doesn't always trust Apple's sylvan.apple.com certificate, so direct video loading may fail. Two ways to make it work:

video_apple_help_option1_body.message: Tick the "Use reverse proxy" checkbox above. Macify will route requests through a Cloudflare Worker that handles the certificate dance for you. Zero local setup.

video_apple_help_option2_body_post.message: in Chrome once. You'll see a security warning — click Advanced, then "Proceed to sylvan.apple.com (unsafe)". Chrome remembers your trust and direct connection works from then on.

video_local_help_title.message: Set up a local Apache server (one-time)

video_local_step1.message: Open System Settings → Screen Saver → Aerial. Click each video you want to download. Each is 500 MB – 1 GB; downloads can take a while and may need retries.

video_local_step2.message: Save the following as videoserver.conf somewhere stable (replace YOUR_MAC_USER_NAME with your actual macOS username):

video_local_step3.message: Symlink the config into Apache's drop-in folder:

video_local_step5_post.message: ) should now serve your downloaded videos.
